channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Costa Rica's Former President on Reforming $700 Billion in Fertilizer Subsidies
item.description: Fertilizer price volatility disrupting global food systems stems from a subsidy structure that incentivizes dependency rather than resilience, the former president argues.

item.title: Adidas Reaches Sub-2-Hour Marathon Milestone After Nike's Costly Pursuit
item.description: Runners Sabastian Sawe and Yomif Kejelcha made marathon history wearing Adidas gear, achieving a barrier Nike had long invested heavily to break first.

item.title: The Adidas Shoe Worn by World Record Breakers at the London Marathon
item.description: Multiple world records fell at the April 26 London Marathon, with all record-setting runners wearing the same Adidas footwear model during the historic event.

item.title: Users Fear Letterboxd Could Lose Its Community-Focused Identity
item.description: Letterboxd has built a loyal following as a largely ad-free, algorithm-light social platform for film lovers. A potential ownership shift has users worried about its future direction.
